div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chairman of the Refugee Settlement Commission (Eddy)
div.p: My Dear Mr. Eddy: I have received, by reference from the White House, your telegram urging that the Congress give its consent to the conclusion of the proposed American-Greek debt settlement.

In acknowledging the receipt of this telegram I avail myself of the opportunity to assure you that the Administration is doing its utmost to obtain favorable action by the Congress in this matter which has such an important bearing upon the successful completion of the work which the Refugee Settlement Commission has undertaken.
